description: Growth strategy configuration for Quantum Reality Codes community. Used by community agents to embed growth mechanics into generated content.

month_1.strategy: Seed with quality content, run first 7-day challenge, post daily codes

month_2.strategy: Weekly challenges, member spotlights, cross-platform promotion, science article shares

month_3.strategy: Viral challenges, testimonial campaigns, SEO blog content, email newsletter launch

content_pillars.purpose: Consistent value delivery, daily touchpoint, builds habit
Structured engagement, community bonding, growth via Day 6 invites
Build credibility, SEO value, shareable content
Peak engagement, community identity, FOMO for non-participants

viral_loops.name: Code Sharing Loop
viral_loops.action: Share buttons include direct links to Telegram/Facebook groups
viral_loops.expected_conversion: 5-10% of shares lead to new group joins

viral_loops.name: Challenge Invite Loop
viral_loops.expected_conversion: 20-30% of invites convert to new members

viral_loops.name: Testimonial Loop
viral_loops.action: Stories are reshared, attracting curious outsiders
viral_loops.expected_conversion: Stories are the highest-converting content type

viral_loops.name: Science Shareability Loop
viral_loops.trigger: Science articles published on the website
viral_loops.action: Members share articles on personal feeds with their Reality Code
viral_loops.expected_conversion: Educational content has the longest sharing lifespan

onboarding_funnel.step_1: Discover (social media, word of mouth, search) → Visit website
onboarding_funnel.step_2: Try (create first Reality Code) → Experience the encoding
onboarding_funnel.step_3: Share (share code via WhatsApp/social) → Create social proof
onboarding_funnel.step_4: Join (click community link) → Enter Telegram/Facebook group
onboarding_funnel.step_5: Engage (participate in daily codes + challenges) → Build habit
onboarding_funnel.step_6: Advocate (invite friends, share stories) → Drive organic growth
